subcodes.first_line: O servants of the All-Glorious Lord! The Caucasus in Persian means Mount Qaf, which in ancient times was a belief held by the peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان حضرت کبریا قفقاز فارسیجه کوه قافدر اسکی زمانده اهل عالمن اعتقادی
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
